name: Vegetable Lo Mein
recipeIngredient: 6 Chinese mushrooms, soaked in warm water and shredded
3 large Celery stalks, shredded to about 3-inch lengths
recipeInstructions:
1. BOIL NOODLES IN SALTED WATER until just done, about 4 minutes.
2. Drain well and rinse in cold water.
3. Mix in a little oil to prevent sticking.
4. Stir-fry mushrooms, celery, bamboo shoots, and bean sprouts in oil.
5. Add salt and broth; stir-fry for another minute.
6. Add oyster sauce and sugar. Push vegetables up the side of the wok.
7. Add noodles, stirring to warm them through.
8. Mix in the remaining vegetables and sauce. If a thicker sauce is desired, add a teaspoon of cornstarch mixed with a teaspoon of water.
